channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: DOGE uncovers VA’s agreement to pay $380K per month for minor website modifications
item.description: DOGE discovered the Department of Veterans Affairs had a contract to have a company make minor modifications to the website for about $380K.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Transportation Sec Sean Duffy slams blue state governor, says criminals 'continue to terrorize' city residents
item.description: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy sounds off on New York Gov. Kathy Hochul on X, claiming criminals are "terrorizing" New York City subway riders.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 4 GOP senators vote with Democrats to undo Trump tariffs on Canada
item.description: A group of Republican senators voted along with Democrats on Wednesday for a resolution to undo President Trump's 25 percent tariffs on Canadian imports, dealing an embarrassing blow to Trump.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: 5 takeaways from Trump's major tariff announcement
item.description: “Our country and its taxpayers have been ripped off for more than 50 years, but it’s not going to happen anymore,” Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Tobias Burns, NewsNation

item.title: If Trump’s math is wrong, tariffs will ‘blow up in his face’: Geraldo
item.description: Trump announced plans for sweeping tariffs Wednesday, saying “our country has been looted, pillaged, raped, plundered” by other nations.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: Answering your questions about President Trump's reciprocal tariffs
item.description: After weeks of anticipation and speculation, President Donald Trump followed through on his reciprocal tariff threats by declaring on Wednesday a 10% baseline tax on imports from all countries and higher tariff rates on dozens of nations that run trade surpluses with the United States.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Rugaber And Paul Wiseman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 5 takeaways from Tuesday’s elections, including bad news for Elon Musk
item.description: Democrats can take yesterday’s elections as one of the first bits of good news they’ve had in months. But there are lots of issues that are still center-right, including immigration.
item.dc:creator: Domenico Montanaro, MPR News

item.title: Democrats demoralized by Trump get a boost from Wisconsin voters and Cory Booker's speech
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — For a day, at least, Democrats across the country have a sense that their comeback against President Donald Trump may have begun.
item.dc:creator: STEVE PEOPLES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump gives GOP senators his support as they charge ahead on tax package and spending cuts
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Republican senators unveiled a budget proposal Wednesday that's central to President Donald Trump's domestic agenda of tax breaks, spending cuts and border security, but they're delaying some of the most difficult decisions, including how to pay for the multitrillion-dollar package
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO and KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Law firms fear Trump orders could affect security clearances of lawyers who are military reservists
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump says his executive orders targeting law firms are being issued in the name of national security, with the White House asserting that the firms don't deserve access to sensitive U.S. government information.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Politics Newsletter: Not so fast-Musk will finish the job
item.description: Welcome to the Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump administration, Capitol Hill and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Social Security's acting leader faces calls to resign over decision to cut Maine contracts
item.description: The Social Security Administration’s acting commissioner is facing calls to resign after he issued an order that would have required Maine parents to register their newborns for Social Security numbers at a federal office rather than the hospital.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein And Patrick Whittle, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Once common, now unusual: Conservative candidate publicly quashes shouts that the other side cheated
item.description: PEWAUKEE, Wis. (AP) — As the first news outlets began calling the Wisconsin Supreme Court election for the liberal candidate Susan Crawford, her opponent called her — to concede.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON and CHRISTINE FERNANDO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump announces sweeping 'reciprocal' tariffs
item.description: President Donald Trump announced plans for sweeping tariffs Wednesday, saying “our country has been looted, pillaged, raped, plundered” by other nations.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dozens arrested in major border state bust targeting bloodthirsty Venezuelan gang
item.description: Over 40 people with suspected ties to the Venezuelan gang Tren de Aragua were arrested by law enforcement in Hays County, Texas, on Tuesday morning, the Texas Department of Public Safety announced.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bitter House GOP divisions erupt after Johnson shuts down votes over Republican mutiny
item.description: House Republicans are still at odds after GOP leaders suffered an embarrassing defeat on the House floor by members of their own party.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scientists fear impact of National Weather Service cuts
item.description: As the summer hurricane season looms, so too do cuts to the federal workforce, including the National Weather Service.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, NewsNation

item.title: Auditor reports that Minnesota muni liquor store profits up, in part due to THC offerings
item.description: Minnesota State Auditor Julie Blaha issued her annual report on municipal-run liquor store sales. It was the first include sales of hemp-derived THC beverages and gummies, and operators suggested those items contributed to store profits in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: No bathroom breaks: How Booker accomplished record Senate speech
item.description: Sen. Cory Booker (D-N.J.) set a new record for the longest Senate speech in history on Monday and Tuesday by holding the upper chamber’s floor for more than 25 hours.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Who is Susan Crawford? Wisconsin Supreme Court winner has fought for union and abortion rights
item.description: Wisconsin Supreme Court winner Susan Crawford has served as a Dane County Circuit Court judge since 2018. Crawford won election that year and again in 2022 to the seat. The county is home to Wisconsin’s liberal capital, Madison.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Republican state Sen. Randy Fine wins special election for Florida's 6th Congressional District
item.description: Republican state Sen. Randy Fine won a special election Tuesday to represent Florida's 6th Congressional District, defeating Democratic challenger Josh Weil and squashing efforts by national Democrats who spent millions of dollars on the race.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Minnesota Department of Health announces layoffs amid federal funding cuts
item.description: The agency issued layoffs and separation notices to 170 employees whose positions were supported by federal grants that have now been terminated.
item.dc:creator: Erica Zurek, MPR News

item.title: Results for key races in suburban elections
item.description: Municipal elections were held in the suburbs of Chicago, with key races including the Aurora mayoral race and Evanston mayor race, as well as a new mayor being elected in Dolton.
item.dc:creator: Anna Roberts, WGN 9

item.title: Legal, medical cannabis fix-it legislation in the works at Minnesota Legislature
item.description: Sen. Scott Dibble, DFL-Minneapolis, is sponsoring several of those cleanup bills for both recreational cannabis and changes to medical marijuana rules. He joined MPR News host Cathy Wurzer ahead of committee hearings Thursday to talk about what the proposed alterations entail.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: Musk says he sent MAGA influencer Ashley St. Clair $2.5M, open to paternity test
item.description: “I don’t know if the child is mine or not, but am not against finding out. No court order is needed,” Musk said.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Republican Randy Fine wins Mike Waltz's Florida District 6 seat: DDHQ
item.description: During November's presidential election, President Donald Trump won the district on Florida’s eastern coast by 30 points.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Senate Democrat will block Trump’s VA nominees to protest cuts
item.description: Sen. Ruben Gallego (D-Ariz.) says he will put a hold on President Trump’s nominees to lead the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) to protest cuts at the agency that provides lifelong health care services to military veterans.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Green card holders, travelers caught in Trump’s immigration crackdown
item.description: A lawful permanent resident who has lived in the U.S. for 50 years was detained because of a decades-old conviction amid tougher immigration enforcement at airports and border crossings.
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose, MPR News

item.title: Election Day: Suburban voters head to the polls
item.description: Several elections will take place in Chicago-area suburbs on Tuesday, including a notable one in Dolton where incumbent Tiffany Henyard will run against Jason House, who won the primary election in February.
item.dc:creator: Winnie Dortch, WGN 9

item.title: Legislation aimed at protecting Florida state parks stuck in committee
item.description: What all started with a leaked proposal to build golf courses and pickleball courts at state parks last year has now resulted in legislation that aims to protect natural grounds from those very acts.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Minnesota insurance costs could continue to rise under new Trump tariffs
item.description: Tariffs are taxes on goods imported from other countries, but these new taxes are not just impacting the prices of our T-shirts and televisions. Tariffs may even lead to higher insurance rates here at home.
item.dc:creator: Tom Crann and Gretchen Brown, MPR News

item.title: How Biden's frailties hampered Harris
item.description: Democratic Party officials and White House staffers were well aware of former President Biden’s frailties ahead of his choice to end his ill-fated reelection bid last summer, according to exclusive excerpts of a new book released to The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, Fox 5

item.title: California Assembly Democrats announce plans to leave X over disinformation, hate speech
item.description: California Assembly Democrats announced plans to leave X over disinformation, lack of content moderation and hate speech.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5
